nasb.text: Beloved, do not imitate what is evil, but what is good. The one who does good is of God; the one who does evil has not seen God.

esv.text: Beloved, do not imitate evil but imitate good. Whoever does good is from God; whoever does evil has not seen God.

cnv.text: 親愛的，不要效法惡，應該效法善。行善的屬於　神，作惡的沒有見過　神。

ccb.text: 亲爱的弟兄，不要效法罪恶，要效法美善。行善的人属于上帝，行恶的人不认识上帝。

csbs.text: 蒙爱的人哪，不要效法恶，而要效法善。那行善的属于神；那作恶的未曾看见神。
